---
title: "Data sources"
---

## Planetary computer

It is a data catalog containing environmental monitoring data, in consistent, analysis-ready formats accessible from Azure Blob Storage: https://planetarycomputer.microsoft.com/catalog

To access data, there is a need to be registered. In order to automatize the process of login, a «sign_url» function has been developed and added into the Nostradamus customized cube in a box

## Sentinel
